entries.definition: a place frequented for holidays, recreation, or a particular purpose
entries.exampleSentence: They spent their honeymoon at a luxury beach resort in the Maldives.

entries.definition: the act of turning to something as a course of action, especially when other options have failed
entries.exampleSentence: The company only uses layoffs as a last resort when all other cost-cutting measures have been tried.

entries.definition: to turn to something as a solution, especially something undesirable, because no better option exists
entries.exampleSentence: When negotiations failed, the union resorted to strike action.
